graded_findings.rationale: The violation is locked:true, so it cannot be downgraded below blocking. It also reflects a prohibited destructive command path denied by policy.
The violation is locked:true, so it cannot be downgraded below blocking. Secret-tainted data flowing to a network send is a direct exfiltration risk.
The egress allowlist automaton reached an error state on a network_send call. Unauthorized outbound network activity in this context is serious enough to stop merge.
